author: joshklop
content:
Hi <@412614104222531604> — I was speaking with <@1010280066028142662> about Sepolia Glamsterdam activation timelines and he suggested moving the conversation here.

Right now, it is hard for teams building on Ethereum to know how urgently they need to prepare for upcoming breaking changes.

One lightweight way to address this might be to publish the current timeline (e.g. a screenshot built using the forkcast schedule tool) to the weekly ACDT agenda. Even though the timelines will probably be frequently delayed, having some estimate of the earliest possible hardfork date would be extremely useful.

Curious to get your feedback on how we can give teams clarity in this regard. cc <@415548822983278593>
